ground_truth.title: Gaming News | Game Rant
ground_truth.main_content: Gaming News - The biggest video game news, rumors, previews, and info about the PC, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo, & mobile titles you play. Featured articles: Final Fantasy 14 Is Being Hit With DDoS Attacks Yet Again. Battlefield 6 Teases What Exactly It Has in Store for Fans With Its 2026 Updates. Sony is Acquiring a Beloved Franchise That First Started 75 Years Ago to the Tune of $457 Million. Yooka-Replaylee's Retail Edition Is A Collector's Dream. Ghost of Yotei's Erika Ishii Reveals Their Top 3 Games of All Time. PC Gamers are in for a Bumpy Ride: Micron Says RAM Shortage Could Last Beyond 2026. Marathon Art Director Leaves Bungie Just 3 Months Before the Extraction Shooter's Official Launch. Ghost of Yotei's Erika Ishii Picks Their Game of the Year for 2025. Epic Games Store Users Only Have 24 Hours to Claim the December 19 Free Game. Ghost of Yotei's Erika Ishii Ideal Game Studio Would Take a Page Out of the Dropout Playbook. Genshin Impact Second Half Banners for Version 6.2 Are Great News for Natlan Fans. Overwatch 2 December 18 Update Includes Vendetta Nerf, Stadium Adjustments, and Aim Assist Changes. Steam Winter Sale 2025 is Live Now and Here Are the Best Deals. Another Blow to PC Gaming: Nvidia May Be Looking to Cut GPU Production Thanks to the Ongoing RAM Crisis. An Award-Winning PlayStation Studio is Reportedly Already Crunching on a Game That Won't Be Out Until 2027. Steam Users Have Until December 21 to Claim 2 More Games Completely Free of Charge. New Borderlands 4 Event Features Absurd Legendary Drop Rates For the Holiday Season. After 15 Years, Nintendo Finally Wins Wii Lawsuit. Stardew Valley Creator ConcernedApe Comments on Update 1.7 and Nintendo Switch 2 Port. GOTY Contender Rushes to the Defense of Baldur's Gate 3 Studio Larian Amid AI Controversy. PC Gamers Have Only 24 Hours to Claim Epic Games Store's Free Game for December 18.
